description_long: This is a large, modern sectional couch with a deep brown fabric upholstery and a matching ottoman. The couch features a left-facing chaise lounge, three main seat sections, and wide, low-profile armrests on both ends. The seat and back cushions are plush and appear to be loose, providing a comfortable and inviting seating area. The legs are thin, black, and metal, giving the couch a slightly elevated and contemporary look. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, deep brown sectional couch with a left-facing chaise, matching ottoman, and slim black metal legs.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full sectional layout, left-facing chaise, and ottoman positioned separately.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the separation between the main couch and ottoman.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the seat cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest, chaise, and ottoman from a different angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all loose and rectangular, with a separate ottoman; no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, slim, black metal legs of medium height, straight and cylindrical with a minimalistic design.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, flat, and low-profile armrests on both ends, straight and rectangular with the same fabric upholstery as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest with three loose, rectangular back cushions; no tufting or division beyond the cushion separations.
